sub_pixel_system.notes: Memory addresses document X/Y subposition as separate 2-byte values (7E9875/7E9879 for EarthBound US, 7E9B26/7E9B2A for Mother 2 JP). Subposition range suggests 256 sub-pixels per pixel.

special_mechanics.name: Stutter Walk
special_mechanics.description: Skip trigger spots by moving through them every other frame. Can skip enemy encounters or story triggers.

special_mechanics.name: Staircase Glitch / Walk Through Walls
special_mechanics.description: Interrupt staircase locking procedure via phone call or critical health warning to enable wall-walking. All game content exists on one continuous 10.2 MB map.

special_mechanics.name: Cliff Walking
special_mechanics.description: Pass through normally impassable blue spaces by exploiting diagonal positioning and push mechanics. Requires proper spacing with passable areas sandwiched between impassable spaces.

tier_notes: Tier 1 empirical data from ROM analysis. Memory addresses confirm 256-subpixel system with separate X/Y position and subposition tracking. No documented movement parameters (walk speed, acceleration, jump physics) in available sources. Game features seamless 2D world with overworld enemies visible on-screen. Sprite tables are 28 bytes with 14 slots. RNG system documented with flow of 14592 sequential values.
sources_used: tasvideos - Memory addresses and position structure
tcrf - Development notes and sprite information
data_crystal - ROM specifications and technical details
